app.name: Market Research
app.footer: Market Research © {{year}} · AI-driven market research & feasibility analysis

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.intro: Tell us your suggestions, the problems you ran into, or content errors — we read every message.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: Describe your feedback or the issue you encountered…
feedback.emailPlaceholder: So we can reply to you (optional)
feedback.error: Submission failed, please try again later

nudge.title: 🚧 Site in testing
nudge.text: Hit a problem or have an idea? Drop us a line — it helps us improve.

auth.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, mix of upper/lower/digit/symbol

passwordPolicy.categories: Must include at least 3 of: lowercase / uppercase / digit / symbol
passwordPolicy.common: This password is too common, please choose another
passwordPolicy.hint: At least {{min}} characters; mix upper/lowercase, digits and symbols

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: All sessions will be revoked; you will need to sign in again.
changePassword.success: Password updated. Please sign in again.

auth.useAdminLogin: Admin accounts must sign in via the admin console

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send a reset link
forgot.sentDesc: If this email is registered, a reset link has been sent. It will expire in 30 minutes.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: At least 10 characters; include at least 3 of lower/upper/digit/symbol
reset.success: Password reset. Please sign in with your new password.
reset.fail: Reset failed — link may have expired

verify.successDesc: Your account is active. You can now sign in.
verify.trialStartedDesc: Your account is active and your AI Unlimited free trial is ready. Sign in to explore all features.
verify.expiredDesc: The verification link is no longer valid. Please request a new one after signing in.
verify.invalidDesc: We couldn't recognize this verification link.
verify.requiredDesc: We sent a verification email to {{email}}. Click the link inside to activate your account, or press the button below to resend.

sent.title: Verification email sent
sent.desc: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}.
sent.hint: Click the link within 24 hours to activate your account. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
sent.resendFail: Failed to resend, please try later

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Secured by Stripe · Cancel anytime · 7-day refund

paidComingSoon.title: Currently in beta testing
paidComingSoon.desc: Paid plans will open later — stay tuned. For now, all features are free to use.

trial.registerHint: Verify your email after sign-up — no card required
trial.eligibleHint: Start now and unlock all features
trial.usedHint: You've already used your free trial — subscribe to continue
trial.modalHint: Not ready to buy? Try {{days}} days of {{plan}} first
trial.startFailed: Could not start trial — please try again
trial.verifyEmailFirst: Please verify your email before starting a trial

paymentsDisabled.banner: Beta period — paid subscriptions temporarily closed
paymentsDisabled.title: No subscription needed
paymentsDisabled.default: We are in a beta testing period — no paid subscription is required. Please use the free trial.

pricing.paymentNote: 💳 Secured by Stripe (cards · WeChat Pay · Alipay)
pricing.adaptivePricingNote: Prices shown in {{currency}}. Stripe converts to your local currency at checkout.
pricing.embeddedPricingNote: Prices shown in {{currency}}. At checkout you can choose your payment currency (USD, EUR, CNY, etc.) with live Stripe conversion.
pricing.adaptivePaymentNote: 💳 Secured by Stripe — choose currency at checkout with live conversion (cards)

upgrade.title: Upgrade · pay only the difference
upgrade.desc: Your current plan is still active. Upgrade to a higher plan by paying just the prorated difference — your end date stays the same.
upgrade.belowMin: The difference is below the minimum charge — no top-up needed; please renew on your own after your current plan expires.

checkout.stripeAutoRenew: Enable auto-renew (monthly Stripe subscription, cancel anytime in Orders)
checkout.title: Scan to pay
checkout.domesticHint: For mainland China: WeChat / Alipay QR payments
checkout.overseasHint: For overseas users: you will be redirected to Stripe Checkout
checkout.stripeHint: You will be redirected to Stripe Checkout; available methods depend on your Stripe account and currency/region
checkout.stripeEmbeddedHint: Pay on this site with card — choose your currency on the checkout page
checkout.currencySelectorNote: List prices are anchored in {{currency}}. Choose your charge currency below.
checkout.missingCheckoutSession: Checkout session is invalid or expired — please start again
checkout.completeFailed: Payment not completed — retry or check Orders
checkout.createFailed: Failed to create order, please retry
checkout.payClosed: Order closed or failed, please retry

resume.missingOrderId: Missing order id, cannot resume payment status
resume.successBody: We'll verify your order and activate your plan (may take a few seconds).
resume.cancelBody: You can continue payment from the orders page, or go back to pricing.

contracts.title: Auto-renew
contracts.unsignConfirmBody: Auto charges will stop. Your current entitlement remains active until it expires.
contracts.openingPortalFailed: Unable to open subscription portal, please retry
contracts.unsignHint: Stripe subscriptions: use "Manage subscription" to update card or cancel via the Stripe portal. WeChat / Alipay legacy contracts: unsign from within their app.

pricingReview.title: Pricing review (live FX)
pricingReview.fxLine: FX ({{date}}): 1 EUR = ${{usd}} USD / ¥{{cny}} CNY · source: frankfurter.app (ECB)

col.eurAnchorTip: The EUR price for the same plan + cycle; the reference others are compared to
col.deviationTip: Local price converted to EUR at live FX vs the EUR anchor. ≥{{warn}}% orange, ≥{{alert}}% red

billingPolicy.title: Subscription & trial policy
billingPolicy.hint: Same policy as the Pricing page free trial banner: configure trial length, trial plan tier, and whether Stripe checkout is open. When payments are off, subscribe clicks show a message and cannot create orders.
billingPolicy.testPhaseApplied: Beta preset applied: 30-day trial, payments off
billingPolicy.usingEnvDefaults: Using server env defaults until you save — then settings apply immediately from the database.

overview.failedEmpty: No failed renewals at the moment

catalog.missingStripeAlert: {{count}} subscription price(s) missing stripePriceId — Stripe auto-renewal cannot run
catalog.trialBanner: Free trial: enabled · {{days}} days · {{plan}} · auto-granted after email verification
catalog.eurOnlyHint: Only {{currency}} prices are shown to customers. Create new prices in {{currency}} and map Stripe recurring Price IDs.
catalog.confirmDisable: Disable this entry? Historical orders stay linked, the row is hidden by default
catalog.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this price? Only allowed when no orders or subscriptions reference it.
catalog.confirmDeleteProduct: Permanently delete this product and all its prices? Only allowed when no orders or subscriptions reference them.
catalog.deleteInUse: Cannot delete: linked orders or subscription contracts still exist. Keep it disabled instead.
catalog.tooltipDelete: Delete permanently (must be disabled first; no order references)

priceForm.codeHint: e.g. STANDARD_1M / AI_12M (unique ID; cannot change after create)
priceForm.slotTaken: This product already has a price for that cycle and currency ({{code}}). Edit or delete the existing row first.
priceForm.displayNameHint: Optional label shown to users; leave empty to show only amount and billing period
priceForm.amountHint: Enter the amount the user pays (in main currency unit, not cents)
priceForm.stripePriceIdHint: Create a recurring Price in Stripe Dashboard, then paste the price_xxx ID here. Required only for auto-renew prices.
priceForm.stripeRecurringPriceIdHint: Recommended: used for subscriptions (mode=subscription) matched by this price’s currency. If empty, we fall back to the Stripe Price ID above.
priceForm.eurAnchorHint: Embedded Checkout uses {{currency}} as the anchor. Customers choose their payment currency on the checkout page.

filters.search: Search email / order ID / transaction no.

refund.title: Manual refund
refund.amountHint: Pre-filled with the remaining refundable amount; lower it for a partial refund

contracts.terminateConfirm: Force terminate this subscription? The payment channel will be notified and the row marked TERMINATED.
